known_issues: YouTube video links pasted in BNHS Hymn Management external link field are not displaying/embedding correctly on the site

existing_features.title: Fix the YouTube video embedding functionality in the BNHS Hymn section so that when a YouTube link (e.g., https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3gPb2XoQ2ug) is pasted into the external link field in BNHS Hymn Management, the video displays and plays correctly on the public BNHS Hymn page
Ensure the YouTube embed player is configured to allow autoplay with sound and includes proper error handling for videos that cannot be embedded due to privacy settings or embed restrictions

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix YouTube video embedding for BNHS Hymn section - external link not displaying video
